title: pilosocereus polygonus subsp. brevispinus
intro: Pilosocereus polygonus subsp. brevispinus, also known as the Short-spined Pincushion Cactus, is a species of cactus that belongs to the Pilosocereus genus. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties that have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Pilosocereus polygonus subsp. brevispinus include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing, as well as its ability to protect against oxidative stress and cell damage. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
